onboarding.tagline: Your health navigator. In your language.
onboarding.situation_title: How can we help you today?
onboarding.situation_subtitle: Select the option that best describes your situation
onboarding.situation_no_insurance_desc: Find affordable clinics and support near you.
onboarding.situation_undocumented_desc: Get confidential care without fear of legal repercussions.
onboarding.situation_mental_health_desc: Connect with therapists who understand your culture.
onboarding.situation_insured: I have insurance but need help
onboarding.situation_insured_desc: Simplify your benefits and navigate the complex system.

chat.placeholder: Describe your symptoms or ask a question...
chat.title: Health Triage
chat.subtitle: Tell us how you're feeling. Our AI guide helps you find the right care instantly.
chat.opening_no_insurance: Hi, I'm Clínica. I'm here to help you find affordable care, with or without insurance. What's going on today?
chat.opening_undocumented: Hi. Everything you share here is private. I'm here to help you find safe care. What's going on?
chat.opening_mental_health: Hi, I'm Clínica. It takes courage to reach out. Tell me a little about what you've been feeling lately.
chat.opening_insured: Hi! I'm here to help you understand your options. What's going on with your health today?
chat.disclaimer: Clínica AI provides guidance based on public health data. If you are experiencing a medical emergency, please call 911 immediately.

map.callout_title: Your safety is protected by federal law
map.callout_body: All clinics marked ✦ are Federally Qualified Health Centers (FQHCs). By law, they must serve all patients regardless of insurance or immigration status. They will not report you.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Clínica Health Navigation. Empowering Hispanic Communities.

home.welcome_text: Access community clinics and medical resources tailored for your needs.
home.bento_ai_desc: Check your symptoms in under 2 minutes. We'll guide you to the right care based on your situation.
home.bento_profile_desc: Don't worry. You can still access care at FQHC clinics.
home.bento_rights_desc: Understand healthcare privacy and access laws for everyone.
home.bento_fqhc_desc: Federally Qualified Health Centers provide safe care regardless of status.
home.safety_desc: Federal law prohibits health centers from sharing your personal information with authorities. Your health data is encrypted and protected under HIPAA and federal statutes.

profile.title: Your Health Journey
profile.subtitle: Review your previous triage sessions and find saved care locations near you.
profile.completed_desc: Discussion regarding moderate cough and elevated temperature. Guidance provided on low-cost urgent care clinics in the East Side area with Spanish-speaking staff.
profile.archived_desc: Inquiry about no-cost vaccination schedules for school enrollment. Recommended contacting the County Health Department mobile units.
profile.need_help_desc: Start a new triage session and get personalized clinic recommendations in minutes.

resources.title: Your Rights.
resources.subtitle: Your Health.
resources.desc: Navigating the healthcare system can be complex. We provide clear, culturally-grounded resources to help you advocate for yourself and your family.
resources.legal_title: Your Legal Rights as a Patient
resources.legal_1_desc: You have the right to understand any treatment plan in your preferred language before agreeing.
resources.legal_2_desc: Your health information is protected and cannot be shared without your explicit permission.
resources.legal_3_desc: Hospitals must stabilize you in an emergency regardless of your ability to pay.
resources.fqhc_desc: Federally Qualified Health Centers (FQHCs) are safety-net providers that offer care on a sliding scale. They are mandated to serve everyone, regardless of insurance or immigration status.
resources.fqhc_fact: FQHCs are strictly prohibited from reporting patient information to immigration authorities.
resources.library_subtitle: Guides and toolkits designed for your journey.
resources.lib_1_desc: A step-by-step manual on sliding scale fees and charity care programs.
resources.lib_2_desc: Safe access to medical care and understanding the 'Public Charge' rule.
resources.lib_3_desc: How to read billing codes and negotiate hospital charges.
resources.lib_4_desc: Tips on being an effective health advocate for elderly or non-English speaking relatives.
resources.help_desc: Our health navigators are available to help you understand your options and find the right care at no cost to you.

clinicDetails.subtitle: Compassionate care deeply rooted in the heart of our community. Your health journey begins in a space that feels like home.
clinicDetails.safety_desc: Under the law, your health information is private. We provide confidential care regardless of immigration status. This clinic is a safe haven for all seeking wellness.
clinicDetails.srv_dental_desc: Routine checkups and emergency oral health.
clinicDetails.travel_est: Estimated 12 mins travel from your current location.
clinicDetails.community_desc: This center has served over 12,000 families this year. We offer sliding scale fees based on income to ensure no one is turned away.

hospitals.add_insurance_prompt: Add your insurance to see which hospitals are in-network
hospitals.no_results: No hospitals found in this area. Try expanding the search radius.
hospitals.home_card_body: Search hospitals that accept your insurance. Powered by Google Maps + AI verification.
